## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Kyle's transition to fwd.digital and align on initial responsibilities and expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Kyle will join fwd.digital, starting officially on October 21st](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Initial focus: client onboarding, operations, and improving processes](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [fwd.digital is growing rapidly (4x revenue in 3 months, now at $160k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [The company is building adaptable AI workflows to disrupt the services industry](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)

## Topics

### Kyle's Transition and Role

  - [Kyle's last day at his current job is tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [He's excited about the opportunity and the chance to build something amazing](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Initial responsibilities will include:](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
      - [Client onboarding and operations](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
      - [Improving processes and documentation](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
      - [Potentially managing 1-2 accounts (mix of "green" and "yellow/red" status)](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [Kyle will have 30-40% of his time for deep exploration and innovation](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### fwd.digital's Growth and Vision

  - [Revenue growth: From $40k/month to $160k/month in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Potential to 3x again by end of year with current pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [Recently acquired office space (9 desks, $3500/month, 50% off)](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Building adaptable AI workflows with expert-in-the-loop capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2647.0)
  - [Goal: Disrupt the entire services industry through AI-powered solutions](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2738.0)

### Current Challenges and Opportunities

  - [Rapid growth leading to some quality control issues (e.g., Strapi feedback)](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [Need for standardized processes and documentation](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Opportunity to improve onboarding, training, and quality assurance](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [Potential to productize internal tools and processes (e.g., AI-powered recruiting)](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)

### Financial and Legal Considerations

  - [Marcel recommends Kyle set up an LLC for tax benefits and financial management](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2106.0)
  - [Suggested compensation: $16,000/month (same as other team members)](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [Discussion of potential tax write-offs and business expense management](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2269.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to set up LLC and business bank account](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2106.0)
  - [Marcel to add Kyle to Fathom for access to meeting recordings](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=3126.0)
  - [Kyle to review Notion documentation and familiarize himself with current processes](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=3096.0)
  - [Marcel to connect Kyle with Jimmy to determine initial client accounts to manage](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=3376.0)
  - [Plan for in-office collaboration starting the week of October 21st](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=3411.0)
  - [Kyle to start engaging with potential clients: Hagen, dy.org, and Minder (e-commerce)](https://fathom.video/share/rGgNT8E_vystFAesjjquXoFxDry46Aqj?tab=summary&timestamp=3272.0)
